text: Today, we're excited to announce that we've closed our Series A and have raised a total
of $20 million led by Sequoia Capital with the participation from Y Combinator and the
venture funds of Microsoft, Workday, HubSpot, One Stream, and leaders across the professional
services and system integrator industry.
Software is one of the most powerful tools in the world, but it only creates value when
it's actually implemented correctly.
Most implementations fail to deliver on that promise.
Okta is here to help teams deliver on the promise of software and actually unlock its
value.
Teams go through months of discovery calls, endless back and forth between stakeholders.
Critical information is scattered across documents, chats, emails, and even worse,
stuck in their heads.
And then six months in, their customer says, wait, that's not what we agreed on.
That's why implementations take so long.
Margin and trust erode, customers wait months or even years to see a fraction of the value
from software they've already bought.
It's not because people aren't working hard.
It's because there's no unified system for how this work actually gets done.
That's why we built Okta.
Okta is an AI native system of action for software implementations.
Okta curates execution ready artifacts like rough orders of magnitude, resource plans,
process flows, user stories, and so much more.
Everything stays beautifully connected in one system, perfectly traceable across the
entire journey.
So you know exactly what was decided, why it was decided, and how it impacts the rest
of the engagement.
Okta helps teams standardize what great looks like, turning their best work into repeatable,
reusable practices across every project.
All inside a platform built with relentless attention to detail, flexible to fit how you
work.
It's one system for every implementation.
Teams are driving up to 80% efficiency gains across discovery and design.
The result is faster time to value, stronger, more predictable execution, and a fundamentally
better way to run implementations.
My team completed a very complex enterprise-sized CPQ and billing project with half the size
project team that we would normally have all because of Okta.
Okta has sped up the delivery of our deliverables.
Over the years I've seen a lot of inefficiency in this industry.
Even the work we were doing before we implemented Okta was very manual.
To our partners and customers, thank you for choosing us over the status quo and for helping
shape Okta into what it is today.
If you want to see how Okta can transform how your team works or join us in redefining
how software gets implemented, we'd love to hear from you.
